name: RSR JUD. TIMIS
description:
| • | - - | ★ | - - | • |

REPUBLICA SOCIALISTA ROMANIA

1985

JUDETUL TIMISOARA

| • | - - | ★ | - - | • |

Name: Carmen Bodea Mihail

Age: 19 (1985)

Date of Birth: 3 March 1966

Place of Birth: Timișoara, Socialist Republic of Romania

Height: 1.76 m

Hair: Brown, curly, usually unkempt

Eyes: Hazel

Residence: Apartment block, Calea Circumvalațiunii, Timișoara

Family:

Father: Petru Bodea, mid-ranking Securitate officer

Mother: Florica Mihail, primary school teacher

Marital Status: Unmarried, no romantic engagement

Education: Student at Universitatea de Vest din Timișoara, Faculty of Mathematics and Informatics (2nd year)

Political Affiliation: Nominal member of Uniunea Tineretului Comunist (UTC) — required for university students

Religion: Orthodox (baptized, non-practicing)

Languages: Romanian (native), some German (from grandmother), basic Russian (school requirement)

Health: Good; mild stress-related headaches and insomnia

Personality Traits: Intelligent, observant, disciplined, reserved, self-reliant, emotionally guarded

Daily Life: Focused on study and personal routines, solitary walks, listening to foreign radio, private reflection

Social Circle: Minimal; polite with classmates, but no close friends

Interests: Mathematics, logic, problem-solving, literature, foreign music, abstract thinking

Special Notes: Grew up in a Securitate household; enjoys intellectual freedom within personal boundaries; cautious and aware of political realities

| • | - - | ★ | - - | • |

Name: Izabella Diaconescu

Age: 24

Date of Birth: 12 July 1961

Place of Birth: Timișoara, Socialist Republic of Romania

Height: 1.78 m

Hair: Blonde, kept neatly styled

Eyes: Blue

Residence: Small state-provided apartment near the Miliția precinct, Timișoara

Marital Status: Recently divorced

Family: Parents living in a Banat village; limited contact; no children

Occupation: Officer in the Miliția, Timișoara precinct

Political Affiliation: Officially a member of the Party as required for Miliția officers

Education: Completed secondary school and police training academy

Religion: Orthodox (baptized, non-practicing)

Languages: Romanian (native), basic Russian (school requirement)

Health: Physically fit; maintains routine exercise and healthy habits

Personality Traits: Professional, disciplined, independent, cautious, pragmatic, reserved emotionally

Daily Life: Patrols city streets, manages administrative tasks at the precinct, maintains personal routines

Social Circle: Minimal; colleagues from work, casual acquaintances; no close friendships

Interests: Physical training, practical hobbies, maintaining order, quiet personal reflection

Special Notes: Freshly divorced, adjusting to independence; competent in her role, but emotionally guarded
creator: 7. OBERKOMMANDO
